params.name: Otzi
params.description:
On Sept 19, 1990 AD, a German couple discovered the body while hiking in the Alps.
Otzi the Iceman is a well-preserved naturally mummified corpse that was named after the valley where it was found. The first tourists who found it thought it was a modern person's corpse, but the Austrian authorities sent the Iceman for analysis and discovered that it came from five thousand years ago, making it the oldest mummy to date.
